CustomField.description: The date the program received the appraisal from the lender or appraiser. Tip: Create a related Appraisal record to enter the details of the appraisal.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
The date the program received the appraisal from the lender or appraiser.
Tip: Create a related Appraisal record to enter the details of the appraisal.
CustomField.label: Appraisal Received
